title: Battery model dataclass with LFP/NMC presets (simulator.py module scope)
acceptance_criteria: BatteryModel dataclass defined with capacity_kwh, max_charge_kw, max_discharge_kw, round_trip_efficiency, chemistry fields
LFP and NMC preset factory functions/constants provided with realistic default efficiency and cycle-life values
Fully configurable: user-supplied values override presets
Type hints mandatory; frozen/slots dataclass where appropriate
completion_summary: BatteryModel frozen dataclass + LFP/NMC preset factories in simulator.py
